body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Granny bus dispatch handshake
body.intention: I intend that predicted side effects of the bus dispatch switch are tracked and annotated within two weeks so nothing silently regresses.
body.description:
**What changed:** Granny dispatch switched from tmux send-keys to bus envelope with two-phase shim handshake.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) cc_task_listener.py still running and consuming GRANNY_DISPATCH channel messages that no longer exist — may cause confusion or errors; (2) orphan watchdog timeouts may conflict with new `acked` status (orphan check may not know `acked` is a live state); (3) DickSimnel.0 shim may not inherit handshake if it uses a custom dispatch path.
**Signals to watch:** Any ticket stuck in `dispatched` or `acked` more than 15 minutes after handshake ships; cc_task_listener log errors; orphan watchdog falsely resetting `acked` tickets.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-18 or when T-granny-bus-dispatch closes.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe and annotate predicted effects as occurred / clear / partial; close when annotated.
**Completion criteria:** No automated verification — observation ticket; done when all three predicted effects annotated.
